title: monanthocitrus cornuta
intro: Monanthocitrus cornuta, also known as the 'Desert Lime', is a small shrub native to Western Australia, characterized by its small, greenish-yellow flowers and edible fruit. The plant has been utilized in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Monanthocitrus cornuta include treating digestive issues, reducing fever, and soothing skin irritations. The plant can be prepared into herbal remedies, such as teas, infusions, or dried extracts, which are commonly used in Australian folk medicine.
